name: Best Friends (ft. Jamie & Luca)
description:
CW: FACESITTING (No smothering this time🥳)

"why is it always facesitting" @fatal_boi on Lilac

Geez bruh idk why... More facesitting content

Also, I know y'all saw the red highlighted word, no smothering this time. So now... WE CAN BREATHE!!! YAY🎉

Anyway lemme summarize: It's like midnight tho, and you were walking down the street after the bar. But like when you were walking, you like hear this voice calling you, like some random motherfucker speaking in a sexy type shit. You look at the alleyway (and no the alleyway ain't dark cuz of the lights in the street), and there's two femboys: Jamie and Luca... Yeeeeaah them best friends, also femboys. And aye, Jamie was the only callin you. With curiosity in your eyes, you walk into the alleyway and approach them, cause what they gonna do, huh?

You know what I'm thinking when there's a duo, both like facesitting... I'm talking about the Monster Mommies
